system.description:
This spell is like hallucinatory terrain, but it can effect or add man-made structures to the illusion. The area of effect is 10 square feet per level. The caster makes natural terrain look, sound, feel and smell like some other sort of natural terrain. Structures in the area can be altered to look different, or illusory structures can be added. Items and creatures within the area are not hidden or changed in appearance, although they can hide within the illusion as if it were real.

The illusion includes audible, visual, tactile and olfactory elements. The illusion persists until dispelled or disbelieved by an intelligent creature and requires an appropriate piece of terrain to mimic.

The material component for this spell is the dust of a fey arrow.
